title: delphinium aemulans var. altaicum
intro: Delphinium aemulans var. altaicum, also known as Altaic larkspur, is a perennial plant belonging to the Delphinium genus, characterized by its tall spikes of blue or purple flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antitussive properties. The health benefits of Delphinium aemulans var. altaicum include its ability to reduce respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, and its potential to alleviate pain and inflammation. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, but it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
